word: G1983 - ἐπισκοπέω - episkopéō - ep-ee-skop-eh'-o - Look diligently

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐπισκοπέω

- Transliteration: Episkopeo

- Phonetic: ep-ee-skop-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to look upon, inspect, oversee, look after, care for

a. of the care of the church which rested upon the elders

b. to look carefully, beware

- Origin: from G1909 and G4648

- TDNT entry: 11:59,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1909 and G4648; to oversee; by implication to beware: - look diligently take the oversight.
